texto: Before capitalism will go to hell, then, it will for the foreseeable future hang in limbo, dead or about to die from an overdose of itself but still very much around, as nobody will have the power to move its decaying body out of the way.
explicacao: Citação de Wolfgang Streeck sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Before capitalism will go to hell, then, it will for the foreseeable future hang in limbo, dead o…” articula reflexao, capitalism, before em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
